title: Server-Modpack-Pvp
description: modpack for all PVP servers, it includes special weapons that have awsome abilities!
body:
This modpack is meant for the PVP server of hyperlinkhyper, it includes many performance mods like sodium lithium and noisium, the genral basics and it includes the manditory mods so you can join the server without any problems.

This modpack adds a ton of mods for a PVP server like:

**Content:**
- Simply Cozy
- Simply PVP
- Simply Server Utils
- Axiom
and more!

**PVP utils:**
- Voice Chat
- uku's Armor HUD
- Full Bright
- Apple Skin

**Performance:**
- Sodium
- Sodium Extra
- Lithium
- Immidiatly Fast
- Noisium
- Ferrite Core

**Other Usefull client side mods:**
- Litematica
- Iris
- Cherished Worlds
- Xaero's World Map

**Q&A:**

Q: Is this modpack light weight?

A: Yes, ive tested it on a school laptop and i got a stable 60-50 FPS on the default settings!

Q: Is there a wiki to find info on this modpack or mods?

A: Yes, https://simplycozy.miraheze.org/wiki/Main_Page

Q: Is this modpack compatible with servers?

A: yes, it can work flawless on a server!

DISCLAIMER: ive NOT made all mods in this modpack, i did make some but i dont get full credit for the full modpack
